description: DOCUMENT is a shared resource requiring coordinated write access
FIGURE_STORE is a shared resource requiring coordinated update access
Chapter 3 references evaluation data from chapter 4 (WRITER_B depends on WRITER_C's results)
Part I (chapters 1-2) must frame contributions from chapters 3-4 (WRITER_A waits for WRITER_B and WRITER_C)
FIGURE_CREATOR needs DOCUMENT and FIGURE_STORE to insert figures into multiple chapters
FACT_CHECKER must verify cross-chapter data consistency requiring DOCUMENT access
REVIEWER can only review complete chapters; major revisions require re-review
REVIEWER decides major revision (re-review needed) vs minor revision vs accept
EDITOR_IN_CHIEF resolves cross-chapter conflicts and makes final editorial decisions
Write -> review -> editor decision -> finalize (per chapter pipeline)
WRITER_C publishes stable results before WRITER_B finalizes chapter 3 references
FIGURE_CREATOR, FACT_CHECKER, writers, and REVIEWER all need DOCUMENT at different phases
Cross-chapter dependency: WRITER_B waits for WRITER_C's results, WRITER_A waits for both, creating a dependency chain that could block if combined with resource contention on DOCUMENT
Multi-resource acquisition: FIGURE_CREATOR or FACT_CHECKER acquiring DOCUMENT and FIGURE_STORE without consistent ordering could cause circular wait
